subject: Melony, the Circhester Gym Leader from Pokémon Sword/Shield, depicted as a cheerful older woman in winter clothing holding a Poké Ball
description: A smiling older woman with short white hair stands centered, wearing a thick cream-and-white winter coat with a green scarf and dark leggings. She holds a red-and-white Poké Ball in her gloved hands at chest height, her posture warm and welcoming. A red Pokéball-stamped patch sits on her shoulder. Behind her, an icy blue ribbon-like ice formation curves across a pale snowy backdrop, suggesting her ice-type specialty. The trainer card frame uses a light blue Supporter banner with the Trainer header in white.
foreground: older woman trainer in winter coat holding a Poké Ball, warm smile
background: icy blue ribbon of ice swooping behind her against a pale snow-colored field
